dashboard_subtitle: North-Western Sahara Aquifer System — Decision-support tool
ts_title: Groundwater storage anomaly has been declining since 2002
map_title: SASS aquifer extent and GRACE mascon grid
proxy_warning_text: Groundwater storage is approximated as GRACE total water storage minus GLDAS-modelled surface stores. This is a first-order separation for trend visualisation — not validated against in-situ piezometry.
footer_credits: Data: NASA/JPL GRACE mascons (RL06.3 V04, CRI) · GLDAS-2.1 Noah · OSS SASS programme
